task.summary: Default task
Removed notebooks
Working on new tasks for JAM
Added custom activation function
Added squared activation derivative cost
Working on new tasks for JAM
Update batch script
Model saving is working again
batch script is working again
Distributional task updates
correct L2 loss
Added recurrent regularizer (as in Sussillo et al. 2015) and corrected velocity derivative loss
Updates to DistProb task
Removed activity regularizer and updated initializer referencing
Improved how configurations and training history are saved
Added joint limit penalty and separated muscle activation and velocity losses within ActivationVelocitySquaredLoss
Added ability to recompute inputs at every timestep. This can be used for tasks such as target jumps or visuomotor rotatation.
In practice the joint limit cost doesn't seem necessary, so I'll leave it here as an inactive placeholder for now.
- Adjusted defaults for center out - go cue is 1 -> 0 - added an input that tells the network where it's starting the reach
start target turns off with go cue
Update recompute inputs to handle new dictionary organization of inputs
Added loss with independent penalty to absolute value of muscle velocity
Fixed callback bug for plotting GRU activity
Updated parallelizer to work with current data structures
animate_trajectory function can now plot goal targets and show a trajectory trail for a specific number of time steps
Multi-layer input
Correcting noise to be applied to hidden activity before activation function
Correcting RigidTendonHillMuscle to work with CUDA

Created a policy file that includes suggested policy classes, including a generalized modular policy that allows for the specification of multiple brain areas with unique inputs, connectivity patterns, and outputs.
Updates to policy: - Added optional delay between modules. This adds significant processing time. - Added trainable initial state - Added optional spectral scaling of recurrent weight matrix
Updates to policy: - Updated spectral scaling code to enforce orthogonal initialization after enforcing sparsity of connectivity
added th.compile flags
Updated compile flags for testing
Updated compile flags for testing
Initial implementation of Dale's Law and additional constraints in modular networks
Initial implementation of Dale's Law and additional constraints in modular networks
remove torch.compile from policy
fix device inconsistencies
modular policy updates
modular policy updates
modular policy updates

MESSAGE.value: Removed activity regularizer and updated initializer referencing
Improved how configurations and training history are saved
Added joint limit penalty and separated muscle activation and velocity losses within ActivationVelocitySquaredLoss
Added ability to recompute inputs at every timestep. This can be used for tasks such as target jumps or visuomotor rotatation.
In practice the joint limit cost doesn't seem necessary, so I'll leave it here as an inactive placeholder for now.
- Adjusted defaults for center out - go cue is 1 -> 0 - added an input that tells the network where it's starting the reach
start target turns off with go cue
Update recompute inputs to handle new dictionary organization of inputs
Added loss with independent penalty to absolute value of muscle velocity
Fixed callback bug for plotting GRU activity
Updated parallelizer to work with current data structures
animate_trajectory function can now plot goal targets and show a trajectory trail for a specific number of time steps
Multi-layer input
Correcting noise to be applied to hidden activity before activation function
Correcting RigidTendonHillMuscle to work with CUDA

Created a policy file that includes suggested policy classes, including a generalized modular policy that allows for the specification of multiple brain areas with unique inputs, connectivity patterns, and outputs.
Updates to policy: - Added optional delay between modules. This adds significant processing time. - Added trainable initial state - Added optional spectral scaling of recurrent weight matrix
Updates to policy: - Updated spectral scaling code to enforce orthogonal initialization after enforcing sparsity of connectivity
added th.compile flags
Updated compile flags for testing
Initial implementation of Dale's Law and additional constraints in modular networks
remove torch.compile from policy
fix device inconsistencies
modular policy updates

log-expression.expression:
, L1, L2
## call animation anim = animation.FuncAnimation( fig, animate, init_func=init, frames=joint_position.shape[0], interval=int(dt * 1000), blit=False )
else: print("Unknown Skeleton!") return None
## save the animated file if save_animation: writer = animation.FFMpegWriter(fps=1 / dt) anim.save(path_name, writer=writer, dpi=400) else: ##display_html(HTML(anim.to_jshtml())) display(HTML(anim.to_jshtml())) plt.close()
